## Complete Chat Frontend

Built the entire Next.js 15 App Router frontend from scratch.

**Citation panel** (#15) — Perplexity-style slide-in drawer with numbered source cards,
document titles, and deep-links to original documentation.

**Inline [N] citation markers** (#37) — Context chunks numbered [1], [2], [3] embedded
at the sentence level in responses.

## Monitoring Stack

Added Cloud Logging structured log sink, alert policies, and uptime checks.
No user-facing changes.

## Test Suite Overhaul

270 backend tests added. pytest fixtures refactored.
